product_overview: Tribiblia is a Progressive Web Application (PWA) that transforms biblical learning into an engaging competitive game. It enables users to play turn-based biblical trivia in classic 1v1 or multiplayer 4v4 modes, with gamification elements, multilingual support (Spanish, English, Portuguese), and real-time remote buzzer functionality.
core_goals: Provide an engaging gamified platform for biblical education.
Support classic and multiplayer trivia game modes.
Enable seamless user authentication and profile management.
Offer multilingual content with full i18n support.
Support real-time multiplayer gameplay with remote buzzer synchronization.
Enable administrators to manage questions, categories, and users securely.
Ensure compliance with security, privacy, and legal standards.
key_features: User authentication system with login, registration, password recovery, CAPTCHA and email verification.
Team configuration screen supporting classic and multiplayer modes with player roster management and QR code session sharing.
Turn-based gameplay with category selection, timed questions, scoring, streak bonuses, and confetti animations for correct answers.
Multiplayer remote buzzer system with QR code joining and real-time synchronization via Supabase Realtime.
User profile management featuring XP, ranks, language preferences, and game history with resume capability.
Admin panel for CRUD operations on questions, categories, and user roles with Excel import/export and multilingual support.
Game instructions screen with flip card animations and navigation to key areas.
Internationalization with Spanish, English, and Portuguese languages, auto-detection, and user selection.
Progressive Web App optimized for mobile and desktop with offline capabilities planning.
Legal pages for Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and Cookies policy accessible from the app.
user_flow_summary: User accesses the app at login screen with options to login, register, or recover password.
Upon authentication, user views Instructions screen explaining gameplay and navigation.
User configures teams and selects game mode and duration on the Team Configuration screen.
Game session starts with category selection, question answering under time constraints, and scoring updates on the Game screen.
In multiplayer mode, remote players join via QR code or session ID on Join screen and use Controller screen as buzzer devices synchronized in real-time.
After the game ends, results and winner are displayed on Game Over screen.
User can view and edit profile, track XP, ranks, and see game history with options to resume past games.
Administrators access the Admin Panel to manage questions, categories, and user roles with advanced tools.
Users can access legal information via About Us, Privacy, Terms, and Cookies screens accessible from navigation.
Guest users have limited access with join and controller capabilities but no profile or game progress persistence.
validation_criteria: Authentication system enforces email validation, password rules, CAPTCHA, and requires email confirmation.
Team configuration prevents duplicate player names and ensures minimum players per team in multiplayer mode.
Gameplay scoring reflects correct answers, streak bonuses, and updates team scores accurately in real-time.
Remote buzzer synchronization is reliable and low-latency across connected devices.
User profiles persist XP, ranks, and preferences including language settings accurately across sessions.
Admin panel restricts access to verified admins and supports full CRUD operations on questions and categories.
Internationalization covers UI, questions, instructions, and legal pages for all supported languages.
PWA features include service worker registration, offline capabilities, and responsive design adherence.
Legal pages contain updated content aligned with GDPR and COPPA requirements.
Performance metrics meet defined load times and stability targets under user load scenarios.

routes.description: Join game session via QR code
User profile with XP and settings

Accept terms and privacy policy checkbox

known_limitations.impact: PWA offline capabilities disabled, may cause cache issues
Guest user progress lost on page refresh
May not be fully GDPR compliant for EU users

known_limitations.issue: Email confirmation required but no resend option visible
known_limitations.impact: Users may not receive confirmation email

known_limitations.issue: Admin panel lazy loaded but no error boundary
known_limitations.impact: Admin panel failures may crash app
